name: Oslo Twists
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat deep fat to 375°F (190°C).
2. Beat the egg yolks, egg, and salt together until very stiff (about 10 minutes). Blend in the confectioner's sugar and flavorings thoroughly.
3. Gradually add the flour; mix well.
4. Turn the dough onto a well-floured cloth-covered board; knead until the surface of the dough is blistered in appearance (about 7 minutes).
5. Divide the dough into halves and roll out each half very thin.
6. With a pastry wheel or knife, cut the dough into diamonds or rectangles about 4x2".
7. Make a 1-inch slit in the center of each piece. Draw a long point through the slit and curl back in the opposite direction.
8. Fry until delicately browned in deep hot fat for about half a minute on each side.
9. Turn quickly and fry the other side.
10. Drain on absorbent paper.
11. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar just before serving.
